Package org.eventb.core

Interface IEvent

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, ICommentedElement, IConvergenceElement, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, ILabeledElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Implementing Classes:
Event
public interface IEvent extends ICommentedElement, ILabeledElement, IConvergenceElement
Common protocol for Event-B events.

An event has a name that is returned by IRodinElement.getElementName().

The elements contained in an event are:

  • refines clauses (IRefinesEvent)
  • local variables (IVariable)
  • witnesses (IWitness)
  • guards (IGuard)
  • actions (IAction)

The attribute storing whether teh event is inherited is optional. This means if the attribute is not present, the value should be interpreted as undefined.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IRodinElement.getElementName()

  • Field Details

    • ELEMENT_TYPE

      static final IInternalElementType<IEvent> ELEMENT_TYPE

    • INITIALISATION

      static final String INITIALISATION
      The label of an initialisation event.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • hasExtended

      boolean hasExtended() throws RodinDBException
      Tests whether the extended attribute value is defined or not.
      Returns:
      whether the extended attribute value is defined or not
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • isExtended

      boolean isExtended() throws RodinDBException
      Returns whether the event is extended, that is whether the abstract children are copied (in particular, parameters, guards, and actions) except refines clauses and witnesses.

      The concrete event has to set all attributes of the event and may add additional children to an extended event.

      Returns:
      true if the event is extended.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • isInitialisation

      boolean isInitialisation() throws RodinDBException
      Returns whether this event is an initialisation event. An event is an initialisation event iff its label is INITIALISATION.
      Returns:
      true if the event is an initialisation event
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • setExtended

      void setExtended(boolean extended, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Marks the event as extended.
      Parameters:
      extended - the new value specifying whether this event id extended or not.
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database.

    • getRefinesClause

      IRefinesEvent getRefinesClause(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child refines clause with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the refines clause
      Returns:
      a handle to a child refines clause with the given element name

    • getRefinesClauses

      IRefinesEvent[] getRefinesClauses() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of all refines clauses of this event.
      Returns:
      an array of all refines clauses
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

      IParameter getParameter(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child parameter with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the parameter
      Returns:
      a handle to a child parameter with the given element name

    • getParameters

      IParameter[] getParameters() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array containing all parameters of this event.
      Returns:
      an array of all parameters
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

      Returns:
